title: Survive the Night
description: A collection of terrifying horror modpacks inspired by Calvin’s Minecraft Hardcore series.
body:
**Survive the Night Collection
🌙**

A terrifying series of Minecraft horror modpacks inspired by Calvin’s Hardcore videos.

**These modpacks add:**

- Horror creatures that stalk and attack you.

- Adventure and exploration mods to keep the world unpredictable.

- Atmospheric tweaks that make surviving at night much harder.

- Handpicked configs to match the exact feel of Calvin’s series.


**Why download this pack?**

If you’ve ever wanted to experience the same scary survival challenges as Calvin, this is the closest way to do it. Each release matches a different series (Survive the Night, The Broken Script, No Moon.jar) so you can play them all.

⚠️ _**Disclaimer: This is a fan project inspired by Calvin. If he asks me to remove it, I will.**_
https://youtube.com/@calvin9000

👉 **Join the community on Discord for updates, bug reports, and suggestions!**

![Wabbanode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd9dd2effce72ec0eb974a2a5b7b3af6c96bdb0.png)
